purpose: Reusable optional cart offer and subscription-line controller for adding, replacing, consolidating, or explicitly removing the MMG Knowledge Subscription without silently enrolling the customer.

customer_states.condition: No MMG Knowledge Subscription line exists in the current cart.
customer_states.behavior: Shows an optional membership invitation and does not select or add a plan automatically.

customer_states.condition: Exactly one MMG Knowledge Subscription line exists in the current cart.
customer_states.behavior: Shows the selected cadence, recurring price, selling-plan name, entitlement, change-plan action, and explicit remove action.

customer_states.condition: More than one MMG Knowledge Subscription line exists in the current cart.
customer_states.behavior: Warns the customer and consolidates the lines only after the customer explicitly selects and confirms a replacement plan.

customer_states.condition: The canonical subscription product is missing or its selling-plan allocations are unavailable.
customer_states.behavior: Displays a safe unavailable state and blocks broken enrollment.

render_parameters.mmg_cart_subscription_product: Optional Shopify product object. Falls back to all_products['mmg-knowledge-subscription'].
render_parameters.mmg_cart_context: Stable surface identifier such as cart-drawer or cart-page.
render_parameters.mmg_cart_instance_id: Unique instance seed for duplicate-safe DOM IDs.
render_parameters.mmg_cart_sections: Comma-separated section IDs requested through bundled section rendering. Maximum five.
render_parameters.mmg_cart_sections_url: Locale-aware page path used as the section-rendering context.

duplicate_prevention_contract.identity_field: Ajax cart item product_id matched against the canonical Shopify product ID rendered by Liquid.
duplicate_prevention_contract.add_behavior_when_existing_line_found: Run the replacement path instead of adding a second persistent subscription line.
replacement_sequence: Read and snapshot all existing subscription lines.
Add the explicitly selected replacement variant with its selling plan and a private replacement token.
Remove every prior subscription line in one cart/update.js request keyed by line-item key.
Rollback the replacement line if prior-line removal fails.
Fetch and verify that exactly one subscription line remains with the selected variant.
duplicate_prevention_contract.same_plan_behavior: When exactly one existing line already matches the selected variant and selling plan, perform no mutation and report that the plan is already present.

removal_contract.confirmed_action: Remove all MMG Knowledge Subscription lines in one cart/update.js request.
removal_contract.scope_notice: Clarify that cart removal does not cancel a separate subscription contract created by an earlier completed order.

section_refresh_contract.replacement_strategy: Replace matching shopify-section wrappers from bundled section HTML when present.

integration_sequence.next_component: MMG Knowledge Library eligibility metadata and selection-mode contract

release_gates: The subscription product and all three variants are provisioned with verified selling-plan allocations.
The controller is inserted once in the cart drawer and once in the full cart page at the approved positions.
Private underscore-prefixed line-item properties are filtered from storefront property displays.
No plan or recurring-consent control is preselected.
Add, same-plan no-op, replacement, duplicate consolidation, rollback, and explicit removal pass QA.
Bundled section rendering refreshes the active theme cart surfaces without duplicate UI updates.
The recurring price and selling-plan name remain visible on the cart line and at checkout.
Mobile, keyboard, screen-reader, reduced-motion, and no-JavaScript behavior pass QA.
End-to-end checkout confirms a subscription contract and hands the customer to the Knowledge Library for the first two titles.
